chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3556 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.15708/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Sanaullah Soomro, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Mujahid Hussain, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Daud Narejo, advocate for the respondent 13. Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Order dated 05.07.2021 was passed by the Senior Member, Board of Revenue. The same was assailed and order dated 16.08.2021 was passed and review there against was filed, the same was disposed of as follows: “4. For the foregoing reasons and in view of the above grounds the order passed by the Ex-Senior Member, Board of Revenue, Sndh, dated 05-07-2021 and Additional Commissioner-II Hyderabad dated 02-05- 1993 are set aside and the review petition are allowed provided Deputy Commissioner Sujawal before taking action and examine the record and Safeguard the Government interest/land, update the record and also act strictly in accordance with law by ensuring that no right of anybody else is usurped.” Counsel remains unable to demonstrate anything exceptionable in the impugned order meriting exercise of writ jurisdiction. Counsel has also failed to demonstrate that the impugned order could not be rested on the rationale relied upon. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
